## Description

<!-- What changed and why -->

## Type

- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] docs: documentation
- [ ] refactor: code restructuring
- [ ] test: adding tests
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes
- [ ] chore: maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] New functions have tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] README.md updated (if new option or command)
- [ ] Version bumped in constants, CHANGELOG, and README badge (if releasing)
